title: job.closed payload (v1)
description: A job posting was closed — the google-indexing worker drops the stale public listing (Indexing API URL_DELETED). HONEST STATUS: CONSUMER-ONLY contract, same as job.published. The worker (apps/job-service/src/workers/google-indexing.worker.ts) subscribes to tenant.*.job.closed on a JOB_EVENTS stream, but NO producer publishes it today and JOB_EVENTS is NOT in CORE_STREAMS. This schema documents the MINIMAL shape the consumer reads.
x-producer: (none active — consumer-only contract; publisher slice not deployed)
x-consumers: job-service google-indexing worker (enqueue Google Indexing API URL_DELETED for the listing)

tenantId.description: Owning tenant (mandatory; also on the envelope).

jobPostingId.description: The closed JobPosting id. The worker reads this off the payload (readJobPostingId); without it the event is ignored.
